task: Open the top of the grill
raw:
SCENE ANALYSIS - A kitchen scene with a granite countertop, a stainless steel grill, a sink, and a wooden cabinet. The grill has a handle on its top. The task is to open the grill, which requires interacting with the handle to lift the lid. STRATEGY - First, reach for the grill handle to grasp it. Then, pull the handle to lift the grill lid. Failure modes include not grasping the handle properly or pulling with insufficient force. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the grill handle for a secure grip; Step 2 grasp the handle to apply force; Step 3 pull the handle to lift the lid.
Goal: open(grill)
Scene: grill, handle, countertop, sink, cabinet
Step 1: reach(grill)
  affordance_region: the top surface of the grill
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, grill, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, grill) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(handle)
  affordance_region: the handle on the top of the grill
  contact: holding(handle) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(handle)
Step 3: pull(handle -> up)
  affordance_region: the handle on the top of the grill
  contact: holding(handle) [progress]
  spatial: distance(handle, grill, >, 0.1) [completion]
  direction: pull_axis(0, 0, 1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(handle, grill) > 0.1
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the top surface of the grill
the handle on the top of the grill
the handle on the top of the grill
